scripts.build:man: bash scripts/cleanup-stale-target.sh && env CARGO_TARGET_DIR="${GIT_MESH_CARGO_TARGET_ROOT:-./target-cache}/build" cargo run --quiet --bin gen-manpage -- man/git-mesh.1
scripts.build: yarn build:man && env CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR="${GIT_MESH_CARGO_TARGET_ROOT:-./target-cache}/build" cargo build --release
scripts.build:clean: bash scripts/cleanup-stale-target.sh && rm -rf "${GIT_MESH_CARGO_TARGET_ROOT:-./target-cache}" && yarn build:man && env CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR="${GIT_MESH_CARGO_TARGET_ROOT:-./target-cache}/build" cargo build --release
scripts.test: bash scripts/cleanup-stale-target.sh && env CARGO_TARGET_DIR="${GIT_MESH_CARGO_TARGET_ROOT:-./target-cache}/test" cargo nextest run --build-jobs 1
scripts.lint: bash scripts/cleanup-stale-target.sh && env CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 RUSTFLAGS="-W unused -W dead-code" CARGO_TARGET_DIR="${GIT_MESH_CARGO_TARGET_ROOT:-./target-cache}/lint" cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings
scripts.typecheck: bash scripts/cleanup-stale-target.sh && env CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 RUSTFLAGS="-W unused -W dead-code" CARGO_TARGET_DIR="${GIT_MESH_CARGO_TARGET_ROOT:-./target-cache}/typecheck" cargo check --quiet --locked
